vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current plant presence. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as established specimens. Only P3 (Pothos) remains, though it is in a state of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos leaf remains, but showing signs of chlorosis and potential necrosis.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf remaining. The petiole appears weak. The rabbit anchor is present but the plant is failing.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears consistently dark and potentially waterlogged or compacted.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in the P3 pot (likely a calcium intervention). A small electronic component (IC chip/header) has been introduced to the desk surface in later images.
biome_observations.fungal_presence: None detected, though the dark soil suggests potential anaerobic conditions.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: No significant change; P3 leaf remains stable.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: P3 leaf shows slight drooping; desk surface debris (receipt/paper) appears.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: Introduction of a small electronic component (IC chip) to the right of the pots.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Lighting conditions shift to low-light/night mode; P3 leaf appears to lose turgor pressure.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Return to baseline lighting; P3 leaf remains in a state of postural collapse.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. P1, P2, and P4 are effectively dead or absent. P3 is the sole survivor but is exhibiting signs of severe physiological stress, likely due to improper moisture management or lack of light-driven metabolic activity.
anomalies: Electronic component (IC chip) placed on desk surface (New Introduction).
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection has suffered a catastrophic loss of diversity. The yellow pot (P1) and the secondary black pot (P2/P4) are devoid of vegetation. The Pothos (P3) is the only remaining specimen, currently struggling with a single, drooping leaf. The introduction of non-biological items like electronic components and eggshells suggests an experimental or neglected environment rather than a thriving botanical setup.
